name: China Demeter Financial Investments Limited
summary: China Demeter Financial Investments Limited, an investment holding company, engages in food and beverages business in Hong Kong and Singapore. The company operates through Money Lending, Financial Services, Securities Investment, Food and Beverage, Alcoholic Beverage Distribution, and Children education segments. It offers loan financing services to individuals and companies; advises and deals in securities; provides asset management services; and invests in listed and unlisted securities. In addition, the company distributes craft beer, sells wine and whisky, and trades in miscellaneous goods; and operates 12 restaurants in Hong Kong and 3 in Singapore. Further, it offers kindergarten and pre-school education services, as well as operates child care center. The company was formerly known as China Demeter Investments Limited and changed its name to China Demeter Financial Investments Limited in December 2016. China Demeter Financial Investments Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
